drive_hint: Pick the drive or card you want to recover from
drive_warning: ⚠️ Important: do not save anything new onto the affected drive until recovery is done
auto_refresh: 🔄 List refreshes automatically when you plug in a card
types_hint: Choose the kinds of files to recover
dest_question: Where should recovered files be saved?
dest_hint: Choose a folder on a different drive than the affected one
dest_same_drive: ⛔ Cannot save onto the affected drive — pick another drive
scan_hint: AlMunqith is examining every byte — keep this window open
ev_read_timeout: Drive stopped responding — trying to revive it...
ev_gap_recorded: Skipped and logged a bad region
results_title: Scan complete — here is what I found
results_hint: Click files to select them, then press Recover
home_title: What would you like to do?
svc_recover_desc: Recover photos, videos and files from a card or disk that was deleted or formatted
svc_wipe_desc: Permanently erase a disk or card so its data cannot be recovered, then format it empty
wipe_drive_q: Which disk do you want to securely wipe?
wipe_drive_hint: Pick the disk or card to erase permanently
wipe_danger: ⛔ Warning: all data on the selected disk will be permanently erased and cannot be recovered
wipe_system_blocked: 🔒 System disk — protected, cannot be wiped
wipe_confirm_warn: You are about to permanently erase the disk below. This cannot be undone once started.
wipe_ssd_note: Note: on internal SSDs, wiping may not be 100% guaranteed due to the drive's internal technology; it is very effective on cards and flash drives.
wipe_type_letter: To confirm, type the drive letter ({letter}) here:
wipe_running: Securely wiping... do not disconnect the disk
wipe_done: ✓ Disk securely wiped and formatted — now empty and ready to use
wipe_failed: Could not complete. Try disconnecting and reconnecting the disk, then retry.
